message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic (1977)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0222","justification":"Study of political attitudes, participation, and voting behavior in West Germany in 1977; directly addresses political behaviour and attitudes in 1970s Germany."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic (1978)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0223","justification":"Follow‑up survey on political attitudes and behavior in West Germany in 1978, focused on participation and electoral conduct."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic (1979)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0224","justification":"Late‑1970s West German survey on political attitudes and voting behaviour, capturing trends across the decade."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic (1976)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0221","justification":"Mid‑1970s survey of West German political opinions, participation, and electoral behaviour."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 1977","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1237","justification":"Monthly opinion barometer for West Germany in 1977 capturing party preferences and political attitudes."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 1978","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1238","justification":"Panel of 1978 West German public opinion barometer datasets focused on political preferences and evaluations."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 1979","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1239","justification":"Continuous 1979 West German political opinion surveys on parties, leaders, and current issues."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1223","justification":"Although fielded in 1980, ALLBUS 1980 contains retrospective items and is often used to analyse political attitudes of the late 1970s in (West) Germany."},{"title":"Federal Election Study 1976 (Bundestag Election)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0834","justification":"Study on voter behaviour and political attitudes in the 1976 West German federal election."},{"title":"Federal Election Study 1980 – Pre‑/Post‑Election (Bundestagwahl 1980)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0990","justification":"Includes retrospective evaluations and longitudinal context for political behaviour and attitudes at the end of the 1970s in West Germany."}]}
